What we do

Everything your business needs to grow online

One team for your website, Google presence, WhatsApp, branding and more — explained simply, priced transparently.

Business Websites

A clean, fast website that makes your business look established and helps customers find you day or night.

  • Mobile-first
  • Loads in seconds
  • Easy to update
Learn more

Google Business Profile

Show up on Google Maps when people nearby search for what you sell.

  • Maps listing
  • Photos & hours
  • Get directions
Learn more

WhatsApp for Business

Turn website visitors into WhatsApp chats with one tap.

Learn more

Online Store

Sell products or take bookings and payments online.

Learn more

Logo & Branding

A memorable logo and colours that make your business instantly recognisable.

Learn more

Reviews & Reputation

Collect more 5-star reviews and show them off to build trust.

Learn more

Business Automation

Auto-replies, enquiry forms and reminders that work while you sleep.

  • Auto-reply
  • Lead capture
  • Reminders
Learn more

How it works

A clear path from idea to launch

No confusion, no jargon. You always know exactly what's happening and what comes next.

  1. 01

    Discover

    We learn about your business, your customers and what growth means for you.

  2. 02

    Plan

    A simple, clear plan — what we'll build, what it costs, and when it's ready.

  3. 03

    Design

    We craft a clean, modern look that fits your business and builds trust.

  4. 04

    Build

    We bring it to life — fast, reliable and ready for real customers.

  5. 05

    Launch

    We put you live on the web, on Google and on WhatsApp.

  6. 06

    Support

    We stay with you — updates, questions and small changes, handled.

Why LocalRise

The reasons businesses stay with us

Not years of buzzwords — just the things that actually matter when you're trusting someone with your business.

3–7

days to launch

1:1

personal support

0

hidden charges

9+

industries served

Clear Communication

No jargon, no confusion. We explain everything in simple language.

Fast Delivery

Your website live in days, not months. We respect your time.

Transparent Pricing

You know the full price upfront. No surprises, ever.

Friendly Support

Real people who pick up and genuinely want to help.

Business-First Approach

We care about your customers and calls, not just pretty pixels.

Modern Design

Clean, premium design that makes your business look established.

Future Ready

Built to grow with you — add a store, bookings or pages any time.

Let's talk
Early days, honestly

We'd rather earn real reviews than invent them

We're a young studio, so you won't find stock photos and made-up five-star quotes here. Instead, be one of our first partners and get founder-level care.

Founding Partner

Be one of our first 10 businesses

Come on board early and we'll go above and beyond to make your launch a success story worth sharing.

  • Priority delivery slot
  • Special founding-partner price
  • Extra hands-on support
  • A real say in what we build

Coming soon
No paid reviews. No stock testimonials. Just honest work — and space here for your story.
FAQ

Questions? Answered simply.

No jargon — just straight answers. Still unsure about something? We're a message away.

Ask us on WhatsApp

Most local business websites are ready in 3 to 7 days. Bigger stores or booking systems take a little longer. We agree on the exact date before we start, so you always know what to expect.
